positive: A stylish, minimalist depiction of abstract nature elements: overlapping silhouettes of mountain ranges, stylized foliage, gentle waves, and abstract stars. The composition should be highly centered and symmetrical, with clean, distinct black and white lines on a cream-colored background. Use a strong negative space aesthetic, emphasizing simple, iconic shapes and strong visual contrast. The artwork should mimic a modern linocut print or woodcut style, suitable for high-quality textile printing. Focus on bold, graphic outlines and a sophisticated, muted earth-toned palette (deep forest green, terracotta, indigo, cream). High contrast, vector art look, clean lines, perfectly balanced composition.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, grunge, photo, realism
